name: Reve
description: Image generation model with strong prompt adherence, accurate text rendering and multi-reference input.

seo.title: Reve — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Reve: Image generation model with strong prompt adherence, accurate text rendering and multi-reference input.

when_to_use: Generating AI images with precise layout and compositional control
Building design tools with controllable text-to-image generation
Producing product visuals with consistent brand style via API
Running high-quality image generation with fine-grained control

cons: Smaller community than Midjourney or FLUX
review.verdict: Worth trying when prompt adherence and readable text matter; Midjourney still wins broader aesthetic battles.
review.best_for: Marketing and product teams needing accurate text in images

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
